signals.headline: Market reaction:** XRP rose 2-2
signals.raw: Market reaction:** XRP rose 2-2.4% to approximately $1.38-$1.39, while Solana gained 0.9-6.3%[3][7]. XRP futures Open Interest surged 5% to $2.62 billion within 24 hours[2]. The social media post became one of the most talked-about moments in crypto in 2026[3].

signals.headline: What happened:** Solana's official X account posted a cryptic 4-second video displaying the XRP logo on April 15, 2026,
signals.raw: What happened:** Solana's official X account posted a cryptic 4-second video displaying the XRP logo on April 15, 2026, triggering widespread speculation about a potential partnership or integration between the two blockchain networks[2][3]. A Solana co-founder hinted that a wrapped version of XRP could arrive on the platform[2].
